meta.title: DEF CON Safe Mode Ham Radio Village  - Panel Discussion  - What makes a good operator
meta.description: Panel discussion around what makes a good ham operator, as opposed to a 'lid' (a bad operator). We'll also talk about all of the strange lingo ham radio loves to use.
